text_block_list.text:
One day, while having lunch at a cafe,<n>I spot
Ikuno Dictus...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Can I join you, Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Of course, feel free.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I've got some tough training<n>after this. I'm
going to need a hearty<n>meal to get through it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hm? Something up?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Please wait a moment. I'll be right<n>back.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: O-okay.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting. Do help<n>yourself to these,
if you'd like.

Ikuno Dictus brings over some salad<n>and side
dishes, then places them in<n>front of Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... What's all this?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I've observed you engaging in some<n>unhealthy
eating habits lately.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I guess I have been a bit lax,<n>now that
you mention it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I believe you're lacking in<n>vitamin B1 and
protein as a result of<n>these habits.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Insufficient consumption of these<n>nutrients is
said to lead to lowered<n>exercise efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So I should eat what you've given<n>me?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Eating these side dishes should<n>resolve
your deficiencies.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
To ensure a long racing career, it is<n>absolutely
vital that you continue to<n>consume the
appropriate amount of<n>these nutrients. Similarly—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat them! And very happily too!<n>Go on! You
should have some too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I'll do just that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Thanks for the food! I feel like<n>I'm all
stocked up on vitamins now.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You won't feel the effects<n>immediately. I believe
it takes some<n>time for you to absorb the nutrients
and—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come on, I was just talking about<n>how I feel.
You don't have to take<n>things so literally.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually, how come you know what I<n>eat on a
daily basis?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You're my friend, so I take notice<n>when I see
you at the cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Truthfully, I've wanted to offer you<n>advice on
numerous occasions, but I<n>didn't want to risk
overstepping any<n>boundaries, so...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't worry about that! I<n>appreciate the
honest input. And I'm<n>actually not very good at
managing<n>my nutrient intake... or however you
put it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know! Why don't we eat<n>together a few
times a week? If you<n>don't mind, that is.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to learn more about vitamins<n>and stuff
too.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. If you would tell me which<n>days work
for you and which ones<n>don't, then I can create a
schedule<n>that suits both of our—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Relax. You don't need to be so<n>formal
about it.
